title: Motion Blur
description:
This mod gives you the cleanest blur
Almost 90% similar to lunar motion blur
body:
AFKZ Motion Blur is a lightweight client-side Fabric mod that adds smooth temporal motion blur with simple in-game controls and saved settings.

Features:
- Motion blur strength from 1 to 10
- /afkzmb on and /afkzmb off
- Saved config between launches
- Safe reset behavior on world join and strength changes
- Compatibility handling for active shader pipeline mods like Iris shaders
  
This mod is designed for players who want a cleaner cinematic feel while keeping setup simple.
